_comment: Manual Vol A match overrides. Format: {wave: {question: [filename, sheet]}}. Use null to force TOC (no Vol A page).

eb97.2._comment: QB1-QB9 are Air Quality questions (EBS524). Without override, system incorrectly picks EBS519 (migrants) because it comes first alphabetically.

eb98.2._comment: QE3 has no plain sheet — maps to QE3_1 (first sub-item). BLOCKINTRO3 is an admin question with no Vol A sheet.
